design_intent: Classic American Transitional living room with warm greige walls, mixed wood tones, and comfortable upholstered silhouettes; tailored, inviting, and layered with subtle contrast in cream, taupe, walnut, and aged brass.

selected_pieces.product_name: Farmhouse Beige Linen-like Sofa with Rolled Arm and Nailhead Trim, 3-Seater Couch for Living Room
selected_pieces.placement_note: Center the sofa on the main wall, floating it slightly off the greige paint to create a classic conversational layout; place a low wood coffee table directly in front and leave breathing room for a large rug beneath.

selected_pieces.product_name: Malinta Contemporary Tufted Club Chair Dark Brown/Espresso
selected_pieces.placement_note: Angle this chair to the left of the sofa, slightly forward of the wall, to form a comfortable L-shaped conversation grouping; pair it with a small side table and allow the wood legs to show against the rug.

selected_pieces.product_name: Costway 2-Tier Round Coffee Table with Wood Grain Finish & Heavy-duty Metal Frame
selected_pieces.placement_note: Place the coffee table centered on the rug in front of the sofa, keeping the round top aligned with the seating group; style the lower shelf lightly so the mixed-material base reads as understated and transitional.

selected_pieces.product_name: 7'X10' Vintage Tufted Distressed Area Rug Tan - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Lay the rug so the front legs of the sofa and chair sit on it, anchoring the whole arrangement and softening the room with a warm, timeworn pattern in tan and muted taupe.

selected_pieces.product_name: Heavyweight Velvet Curtain Rod Pocket Panels (Set of 2) Beige 120”
selected_pieces.placement_note: Hang the panels high and wide at the main windows so they skim the floor in soft folds, adding vertical softness and a refined finished edge to the room.

selected_pieces.product_name: 36" x 24" Over the Mantel Mirror Gold - Threshold™: Rounded Top, Metal Frame, Wall Mounted
selected_pieces.placement_note: Mount the mirror above a fireplace mantel or console on the focal wall, centered to catch the overcast light and add a subtle aged-brass note that complements the mixed wood tones.

selected_pieces.product_name: Tall Beaded Ceramic Vase Ivory - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Place the vase on the coffee table or a nearby console with a few simple stems, using its ivory tone and fluted texture to add quiet sculptural interest without visual clutter.
